info.name: Insurance Repair Platform — v2 Full API
info.description:
Complete API collection.

ROLES:
- client (role_id:1) — add property, scan rooms, submit claims, pay, sign off, review
- builder (role_id:2) — accept jobs (needs KYC+Stripe), site visits, progress, complete
- admin (role_id:3) — full access, KYC reviews, ownership verification

SETUP:
1. Import this collection
2. Create environment: BASE_URL = http://localhost:8000
3. Register → Verify OTP → token auto-saves

TEST ACCOUNTS:
- client@test.com  (role_id:1)
- builder@test.com (role_id:2)
- admin@test.com   (role_id:3)

item.name: 1. Auth - Register, Email OTP, Login

request.description:
🔒 PUBLIC

Registers user and sends 6-digit OTP to email.
Token NOT issued until OTP verified.

role_id: 1=client  2=builder  3=admin

🔒 PUBLIC
Builder also needs KYC + Stripe before accepting jobs.

🔒 PUBLIC

Enter the 6-digit code from email.
Success: token issued and saved to {{TOKEN}}.
Expiry: 10 minutes.
🔒 PUBLIC — Sends fresh OTP. Rate limited.
Switches active token to client.

item.description: Email OTP authentication. Flow: Register → get 6-digit OTP by email → verify → get token.

item.name: 🪪 2. KYC — Identity Verification

request.description:
🔒 ALL ROLES (own KYC)

document_type options:
  passport | driving_licence | national_id
  company_registration | insurance_certificate | public_liability

Clients: passport/licence + selfie
Builders: passport + company_registration + public_liability

Files stored in S3: kyc/{user_id}/
All admins notified.

🔒 builder
Submit once per document type.
🔒 builder

body.raw: "\ud83d\udd12 admin ONLY\nSets kyc_status=approved. User notified by email."

request.description:
🔒 admin ONLY
User notified with reason. Can resubmit.

item.description: KYC required before clients can submit reports and builders can accept jobs.

request.description:
🔒 client | admin
❌ builder → 403
🔒 owner | admin

🔒 client | admin
Notifies all admins to review.
🔒 admin ONLY
🔒 client | admin ❌ builder, admin of other → 403

item.name: BUILDER - Update Room After Site Visit

request.description: 🔒 owner | builder(assigned job) | admin

🔒 client | admin
Auto-triggers AI analysis after upload.
Called by AI engine after 3D model processing is complete. Updates accurate dimensions and sets scan_status to 'complete'.

🔒 client | admin
❌ builder → 403

Requires: KYC approved + ownership verified
Auto-calculates: materials + labour + 12% overhead + 20% VAT
Generates: RPT-XXXXXXXX reference

🔒 client | admin
draft → submitted. Triggers admin notification.

🔒 admin ONLY
Lists all reports/claims for admin review with approve/reject actions.

🔒 admin ONLY ❌ client, builder → 403

Triggers: AUTO BUILDER MATCHING — all eligible builders notified instantly.
🔒 admin ONLY

item.name: 👷 6. Builder Auto-Matching

request.description:
🔒 builder ONLY ❌ Others → 403

Requires: KYC approved + Stripe ready
First builder wins (DB lock). Second → 409 Conflict.

item.description: Builders notified automatically on report approval. First to accept wins.

request.description: 🔒 builder(own) | admin ❌ client → 403
🔒 builder(own job) | admin

🔒 client (property owner) ONLY ❌ builder, admin → 403

Triggers: Stripe escrow release to builder.
Report marked completed.

item.name: 💬 8. Live Chat (Reverb — 3 roles: client, builder, admin)

request.description:
🔒 ALL 3 JOB PARTICIPANTS (client | builder | admin)
Broadcasts instantly via WebSocket to all connected parties.
type: text | photo

🔒 ALL 3 JOB PARTICIPANTS
Upload via POST /media first, then use returned URL as attachment_url.

item.description: Real-time messaging. All 3 parties see messages instantly via WebSocket (Reverb).

request.description:
🔒 client (property owner) ONLY ❌ builder, admin → 403

Returns client_secret for Stripe.js.
Funds held in escrow until client signs off.
On sign-off: auto-released to builder minus 5% platform fee.

🔒 client ONLY ❌ builder, admin → 403
Requires: signed-off job. One per job. Rating 1-5.

item.name: 🧪 12. Policy Tests — All Should Return 4xx

request.description: LOGIN AS BUILDER FIRST → expect 403
LOGIN AS ADMIN → expect 403
LOGIN AS CLIENT → expect 403
LOGIN AS BUILDER → expect 403
Register without verifying OTP → 403
Job already accepted → 409 Conflict
No Bearer token → 401
Builder with kyc_status=not_submitted → 422

item.description: Run these to confirm policies are enforced.
